message: Starting the Singapore AI Agent Boom Simulation...
Hey FlowinFish, what's happening in Singapore right now?
AI agents are starting to appear everywhere in Singapore.
I heard GovTech launched a new AI assistant today!
My company is testing Swarm Intelligence next week.
Are the people happy about the AI boom?
The tech sector is booming and everyone is excited about the future!
I just got a promotion because of my AI skills! 🎉
FlowinFish is making my daily work so much easier!
Change the weather to stormy, I think some people are worried.
Some citizens are expressing concerns about job displacement.
Is this Swarm AI going to take over my accounting job?
I need to learn prompt engineering fast...
But the government is providing heavy subsidies for upskilling!
The SkillsFuture credits are helping everyone adapt!
Just signed up for a free AI course! 🥳
Singapore is going to be the top AI hub in Asia!
